_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in patients with neurofibromatosis type 1 and 2 in Canada.

_contextSnippet: In our study, when we looked at the Ablon index—rated by an examiner—we did not find a correlation with mental health; however, when we used self-reported physical appearance, it became a major driver of mental health related QoL.
details: Did not correlate with mental health outcomes when rated by examiner, unlike self-reported physical appearance measures which were major drivers of mental health-related QoL.
